allow: Bash(do gh issue close $num --comment "Completed: version fields fixed and synced with Cargo.toml workspace version 2.0.0-alpha.1")
Bash(gh issue close 32 --comment "Completed: version-bump.yml workflow created with support for explicit version, bump types \(major/minor/patch/pre-*\), PR creation, and git tagging")
Bash(gh issue close 33 --comment "Completed: version-check job added to ci-rust.yml — verifies Cargo.toml, Package.appxmanifest, and Info.plist are in sync")
Bash(gh issue close 36 --comment "Completed: release.yml enhanced with version extraction, SHA256 checksums, release notes from CHANGELOG, consistent artifact naming, and pre-release detection")
Bash(gh issue close 37 --comment "Completed: version and release-local commands added to justfile")
Bash(gh issue close 38 --comment "Completed: docs/Dev_Notes.md created with version management, release process, CI/CD overview, and GitHub Projects workflow documentation")
Bash(gh issue close 39 --comment "Completed: GitHub Wiki pages created — Home, Version Management, Release Process, CI/CD Pipelines")
Bash(gh issue list --milestone "M3 — CLI" --state all --json number,title --jq '.[] | ""#\\\(.number\) \\\(.title\)""')
Bash(gh issue list --milestone "M3 — CLI" --state open --json number,title --limit 20)
Bash(gh issue list --milestone "M3 — CLI" --state all --json number,title,state --limit 20)
Bash(do gh issue close $i --comment "Implemented and verified — 45 mm-cli tests passing, clippy clean, formatted.")
Bash(gh issue close 62 --comment "Documentation updated: PROJECT_STATUS.md \(M3 complete, 36% overall, 444 tests\), docs/CHANGELOG.md \(v2.0.0-alpha.4 entry\), MEMORY.md.")
Bash(gh issue list --milestone "M1 — Core Engine \(Rust\)" --state open --json number,title --limit 20)
